demo.title: Play a song on X
demo.code:
post a song from EBM

-> looks up EBM in songs-catalog.json, picks a song,
   replies to the requester with the video URL and the
   correct caption: title + $EBM + CA.

setup: No on-chain transactions required — this skill only posts to X
Bankr must have X posting permissions configured
Trigger: a user on X asks for a song from a Meme for Trees band
